projects.project_about: Built a full monitoring system for infrastructure and applications using Prometheus, Grafana, and Alertmanager; implemented alert rules, Telegram notifications, and dashboard visualization.
Designed monitoring and logging solution for Kong Gateway; collected metrics (kong_http_requests_total), built queries, and visualized traffic per service.
Deployed OracleDB exporter and integrated with Prometheus; monitored database performance, connections, and metrics using custom configuration.
Configured Blackbox Exporter to monitor HTTP and TCP endpoints; implemented uptime checks and alerting for services.
